description_long: This train station is a modern, low-profile structure set within a landscaped area featuring a mix of grass and trees. The building itself has a flat, rectangular roof with clean lines and a combination of white and gray exterior surfaces, suggesting a contemporary architectural style. The station is surrounded by a patch of green terrain, with several trees and shrubs providing a natural buffer around the structure. There are multiple entry points visible, and the station appears to have a main entrance with a covered area, possibly for passenger drop-off or waiting. The overall design is minimalist, with an emphasis on geometric forms and integration with the surrounding landscape. No visible railway tracks, canopies, or signage are apparent from the provided views.
description: A modern, flat-roofed train station set in a landscaped grassy area with trees, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The structure is surrounded by greenery and has multiple visible entry points.
description_view_0: The station is seen from an angle showing the main building nestled among trees, with the flat roof and white facade prominent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main entrance area, with a covered section and more visible landscaping in the foreground.
description_view_2: The station's elongated side is visible, showing the flat roof and the integration of the building with the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: A rear or side perspective, emphasizing the green space and the station's placement within the landscape, with fewer architectural details visible.
